title: JSON allows unescaped control characters in strings
description:
drh added on 2017-04-10 12:14:46:
The JSON spec requires that control characters are always escaped.  However,
the SQLite JSON1 extension allows unescaped control characters in input strings
to the "json_valid()" function.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_json (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, data TEXT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_json (data) VALUES ('{"key": "value\nwith control character"}');
INSERT INTO test_json (data) VALUES ('{"key": "value\twith tab character"}');
SELECT CASE WHEN data IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_valid FROM test_json WHERE id = 1;
SELECT CASE WHEN data IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_valid FROM test_json;
key_bug_features: Unescaped control characters in JSON input strings
